articles.title: Kane Williamson retires from international cricket
articles.description: New Zealand's record run-scorer opts out of completing ongoing Test series in England

articles.title: Hridoy, Litton and Mosaddek carry Bangladesh to 274 in quest for 3-0
articles.description: Australia's bowlers closed out well but the visitors faced a tough chase to avoid a whitewash

articles.title: Taskin, Mustafizur set up famous series win for Bangladesh
articles.description: Australia crashed to 0 for 3 and despite a century stand from Labuschagne and Bartlett, the home side came out comfortable winners

articles.title: Gill, Rahul seal India's chase for 1-0 lead after Gurbaz century
articles.description: Gurbaz's 102 off 51 went in vain as the rest of the Afghanistan batters managed just 80 runs together

articles.title: Wyatt-Hodge century drives England to statement victory in tournament opener
articles.description: Freya Kemp starred with four wickets, as Sciver-Brunt makes emphatic return from injury

articles.title: Kathryn Bryce's all-round heroics lead Scotland to maiden T20 World Cup win
articles.description: She followed up a 39-ball 60 with two wickets in a captain's performance

articles.title: Ireland beat Bangladesh; Scotland thump Pakistan; NZ ace 184 chase vs SA
articles.description: Canning and Maguire starred for Ireland, while Bryce's 43-ball 94 took Scotland to a DLS win

articles.title: Rob Key: England Test team is not a 'national embarrassment'
articles.description: Managing director won't rule out sacking Stokes following incident in Chelsea nightclub

articles.title: Stokes, Atkinson omitted from second Test as Root steps up as interim captain
articles.description: England name Jofra Archer and Jordan Cox in rejigged squad after nightclub incident

articles.title: Three police officers suspended after alleged harassment of Bangladesh cricketer Nayeem Hasan
articles.description: The suspended officers are sub-inspector Mohammad Shafiqul Islam Bhuiyan, constable Mohammad Rasel Chowdhury, and a police operations management constable whose identity has not been disclosed.

articles.title: Dropped England captain Ben Stokes trains with Durham after nightclub controversy
articles.description: In the aftermath of the incident, there were reports surrounding Stokes' international future.
